codeReview.summary: Implementation fully meets requirements. The `/global/decentralized_finance_defi` endpoint is correctly implemented with the expected `data` envelope and all required DeFi aggregate fields (defi_market_cap, eth_market_cap, defi_to_eth_ratio, trading_volume_24h, defi_dominance, top_coin_name, top_coin_defi_dominance). The implementation properly reuses existing market/category infrastructure by filtering out stablecoins from the DeFi market cap calculation and derives aggregates from current market snapshots.

summary: The feature implementation is complete and correct. The worker followed the core-api-worker skill procedure: wrote failing tests first, implemented the route, ran targeted tests (43 passed including new test), verified typecheck passed, and performed manual curl verification on port 3102. The test coverage validates the data envelope shape, all aggregate fields, and ensures numeric values are finite. No blocking or non-blocking issues identified.
